title: M17 Field-Level Shadow Validation And Operating Universe

items.title: Default operating universe is expanded
items.description: The repo defaults to `core_operating_40` when QUANTA_SOURCE_SYMBOLS is not explicitly configured.

items.title: Shadow validation exposes field-level data quality
items.description: Supplementary validation reports field-level match/mismatch/missing counts and tolerances for price and liquidity fields, rather than only close_raw.

items.title: Live provider covers the larger universe
items.description: The canonical Tushare provider returns 40 tracked bars and 40 fundamental overrides for the `core_operating_40` universe.

items.title: Live backfill remains idempotent on the larger universe
items.description: The isolated live backfill smoke continues to show first-run insert and second-run skip semantics on recent open days under `core_operating_40`.
